productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Brown Striped Shirt
description: CompositionLight brown shirt made of blended fabric, that has blue, white and red vertical stripes, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careWash separately with mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironLook stylish in this striped shirt from mark taylor.  The thin red, white and blue stripes on the soft lavender adds a touch of discreet styling to this simple shirt.  Pair it with pants and leather shoes for a well groomed look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
